sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91463" key="pukti/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πυκτίζω</orth>, as if <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πτυκτίζω</foreign>, <sense id="n91463.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fold</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
